title: [MTR/NTE] Virgin Trains Class 390 'Pendolino'
description: Class 390 units in Virgin Trains West Coast livery, for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![Class 390 Pendolino in Virgin West Coast Livery](https://i.imgur.com/FogGHK0.png)

# **Virgin Trains West Coast Class 390 'Pendolino' Pack**
This is a resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway, adding the Class 390 'Pendolino' to your in-game train fleet!

Ride in your MTR map with the amazing Class 390 'Pendolino' in the Original Virgin Trains West Coast Livery, train originally made by the talented Transport Fever 2 mod maker cw_315, and converted into MTR by Vitor2005, this train will make your High Speed trips shine.

Featuring: Class 390 in the first Virgin West Coast Trains Livery
